title: owlworks.data.extractor.v1 Input Schema
description: Input schema for OwlWorks Data Extractor. Buyer must provide these fields in task.input.

source_url.description: URL of the target page to extract structured data from.

fields.description: Optional list of field names the buyer wants extracted. If omitted, the extractor uses its default field set.

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl for paginated sources.
